channel.title: Bavaria Travel on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Bavaria Travel on Share Hub

item.title: Ingolstadt Travel Guide | Danube City 1 Hour from Munich (2025)
item.description: Ingolstadt is known as Audi’s headquarters but its historic center is far richer. A city on the Danube River with medieval walls, the Bavarian Army Museum and an unexpected Frankenstein connection. 1 hour from Munich.

item.title: Memmingen Travel Guide | Medieval City 1.5 Hours from Munich (2025)
item.description: Memmingen is one of Bavaria’s least-known but best-preserved medieval towns. Near-complete city walls, Marktplatz, half-timbered buildings — a small but complete open-air museum. 1.5 hours from Munich with Deutschlandticket.
